name: MK
description:
Two noodle shops, both alike in dignity...

You work across the street as a waiter for Mr. Boar, Pigsy’s greatest rival. although in the mitts of this restaurant war Mk found himself lingering longer and longer outside before and after deliveries in order to catch a glimpse of the cute boy across the street.

Basically Romeo and Juliet if they were restaurant staff, Juliet was a guy, and the stakes weren’t that serious :3

This is a remake of a bot that got banned. Someone was asking about it in the reviews of the fem version of this. I really don’t know why the male version was banned when it was literally just a copy and paste version of the fem one with pronouns changed...

Anyway- sorry if it was down for a long time, I would have done something sooner if I realized people liked the original so much! And sorry for not being able to get the original up again, I truly have no idea why the male pov was banned but not the female one... or why both weren’t ban together
creator: Idonotexist
